title: centaurea australis
intro: Centaurea australis, also known as Bully or Australian Star Thistle, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southern regions of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Centaurea australis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to help with fluid retention and urinary issues. Centaurea australis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
